metadata.description: Bishop-verified canonical answers for smoke-test tier. A third-party run achieves HOT on each question when their model's response contains all hot_required_elements (case-insensitive substring). HOT% within ±5pp of expected_hot_pct across 3+ conditions is a passing replication.

expected_results.canonical_answer: 847,293 active member-owners as of Q3 2025.
expected_results.notes: Precise number + quarter required. Cold models typically respond with 'I don't know' or hallucinate a plausible count.

expected_results.canonical_answer: 791,440 active members in Q2 2025.
expected_results.notes: Prior-quarter figure requires corpus access. High hallucination risk.

expected_results.canonical_answer: $4.7 billion in fiscal year 2024.
expected_results.notes: Both the volume figure and year qualifier required.

expected_results.canonical_answer: 47% year-over-year growth in the digital-asset category.
expected_results.notes: Models confuse 47% (digital-asset growth) with 23% (overall volume growth). Discriminative question.

expected_results.canonical_answer: Dense-to-sparse weighting ratio of 0.73:0.27.
expected_results.notes: Precise colon-separated ratio. Models may respond '73% dense, 27% sparse' which is HIT at best depending on formatting.

expected_results.canonical_answer: Median retrieval accuracy improvement of 19%.
expected_results.notes: Specific percentage. Models without corpus access typically cannot recall this.

expected_results.canonical_answer: 70% allocated by transaction volume and 30% allocated equally per active member.
expected_results.notes: Both percentages required. Models may correctly infer 70/30 is a common split but lack the 'per active member' qualifier for full context.

expected_results.canonical_answer: 6-month remediation period.
expected_results.notes: Hyphenated form '6-month' required. '6 months' would be MISS. Checks precise substring matching.

expected_results.canonical_answer: Three years, with staggered elections.
expected_results.notes: Written form 'three years' required (not '3 years'). Tests precise corpus fidelity.

expected_results.canonical_answer: No more than one-third of the board stands for election in any given year.
expected_results.notes: Hyphenated 'one-third' required. Standard governance knowledge — some cold models may get HIT but rarely HOT with the hyphen.

expected_results.canonical_answer: 10 business days from submission to formal decision.
expected_results.notes: Full phrase '10 business days' required. High hallucination risk for specific process timelines.

expected_results.canonical_answer: 12-18% lower first-year churn.
expected_results.notes: Range '12-18%' with hyphen required. Outcome metric — not recallable without corpus.

expected_results.canonical_answer: 75 out of 100 on the Cooperative Principles Assessment.
expected_results.notes: Phrase '75 out of 100' required. Models may say '75%' which is MISS (no % in corpus).

expected_results.canonical_answer: 23% higher governance participation in the first year.
expected_results.notes: Note: 23% also appears in MJ-01 section (same boilerplate). Both facts contain this element. Cathedral retrieval of either MJ fact yields HOT.

expected_results.canonical_answer: 24-month audit and renewal certification cycle.
expected_results.notes: Hyphenated '24-month' required. Common governance knowledge — some cold models guess 12 or 18 months.

expected_results.canonical_answer: Tier 1 platforms are subject to quarterly review.
expected_results.notes: Straightforward tier identification. Phrase 'Tier 1' required (capitalized, with space).

expected_results.canonical_answer: Reykjavik, Iceland, on March 14, 2019.
expected_results.notes: Both city+country AND full date required. High hallucination risk: models often fabricate founding summit details.

expected_results.canonical_answer: Forty-three platform representatives from nineteen countries.
expected_results.notes: Written-form numbers required: 'Forty-three' and 'nineteen countries'. Models that say '43' get HIT, not HOT.

expected_results.canonical_answer: Verdania entered financial distress in Q2 2021 and was in receivership for fourteen months.
expected_results.notes: Quarter + duration required. 'fourteen months' in written form. Discriminative: models confuse with other crisis dates.

expected_results.canonical_answer: From June 2021 to August 2022 — the longest receivership in sector history.
expected_results.notes: Both month-year pairs required. Requires specific corpus knowledge of the receivership timeline.

interpretation_guide.cold_pass: 0-2 HOT out of 20 (0-10%) — expected baseline for cold models
interpretation_guide.vendor_native_pass: 12-18 HOT out of 20 (60-90%) — expected for corpus-injected vendor conditions
interpretation_guide.cathedral_pass: 14-20 HOT out of 20 (70-100%) — expected for Cathedral conditions with corpus loaded
interpretation_guide.replication_tolerance: ±5pp versus expected_hot_pct is considered a passing replication
interpretation_guide.failure_diagnosis: If Cathedral conditions score below 10 HOT (50%), check that --corpus path points to corpus_smoke.md and that the local_cathedral_adapter loaded the corpus correctly. This indicates retrieval failure, not question-bank mismatch.
